testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out: Given User Navigate to Navia................................................passed When User Click login with client code......................................passed And User Enter Client Code..................................................passed And User Enter Password....................................................passed And User Click Agree CheckBox...............................................passed And User Click Login button.................................................passed And User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy...........................passed And User Click Login Again..................................................passed

testcase.name: IPO
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User MouseOver Dashboard and click IPO/NFO and Click....................passed And User Select Current IPO and Click Apply "1".............................passed And User enter UPI ID , Category , Quantity (Lots) , BID Options and Price Cut.passed And User Click Agree and Click Submit.......................................passed And User Clik Yes For IPO Amount Payable....................................passed
